ddls:
CREATE TABLE "evaluation_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the evaluation method (e.g., BLEUS6, NIST) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the evaluation method */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the evaluation method was added to the system */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the evaluation method was last updated */,
  "method_type" TEXT /* Type of evaluation method (e.g., automatic, manual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation result */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation that this result belongs to */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being evaluated */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the evaluation took place */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the evaluation method used */,
  "average_rank" REAL /* Average rank obtained from evaluation */,
  "confidence_interval_low" REAL /* Lower bound of the 95% confidence interval */,
  "confidence_interval_high" REAL /* Upper bound of the 95% confidence interval */,
  "orange_score" REAL /* Score indicating performance for the ORANGE metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_results_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES evaluation_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_results_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_results_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_results_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each NLP model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "developer" TEXT /* Name of the developer or organization that created the model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the model's capabilities */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of NLP model (e.g., language translation, text classification) */,
  "architecture" TEXT /* Architecture of the NLP model (e.g., transformer, recurrent neural network) */,
  "training_dataset" TEXT /* Dataset used to train the model */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was added to the system */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being evaluated */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the evaluation took place */,
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluator who conducted the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation method used */,
  "evaluation_status" TEXT /* Status of the evaluation (e.g., completed, in progress) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_evaluation_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_method_id") REFERENCES evaluation_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_evaluator_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluator_id") REFERENCES evaluators ("evaluator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluators" (
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluator */,
  "evaluator_name" TEXT /* Full name of the evaluator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the evaluator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the evaluator (e.g., data scientist, researcher) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the evaluator belongs to */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise of the evaluator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation that this metric belongs to */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being evaluated */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the evaluation method used */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES evaluation_methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comparison_logs" (
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comparison log entry */,
  "model_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first model being compared */,
  "model_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second model being compared */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation that this comparison belongs to */,
  "comparison_date" TEXT /* Date of the comparison */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result or finding from the comparison */,
  "comparison_method" TEXT /* Method used for the comparison (e.g., statistical test) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comparison_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparison_logs_model_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("model_id_2") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparison_logs_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparison_logs_model_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("model_id_1") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation being referred to */,
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluator giving the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback provided */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., comment, suggestion) */,
  "response" TEXT /* Response to the feedback */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date when the response was provided */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_evaluator_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluator_id") REFERENCES evaluators ("evaluator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "dataset_description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "dataset_type" TEXT /* Type of dataset (e.g., text, image) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_dataset" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for the evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id", "dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_dataset" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used to train the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id", "dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluator_expertise" (
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluator */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise of the evaluator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluator_id", "expertise")
)
